info.title: Hamrah API
info.description: REST API for the Hamrah application. Every response uses a uniform JSON envelope: `{ success, message, data }` on success and `{ success, message, errors }` on failure.

post.description: Generates a one-time code and sends it to the phone number via SMS.
Verifies the code, creates the user if needed, and returns a bearer token.
Revoke the access token used for the current request.

get.description: Show the authenticated user's identity verification status.

post.description: Stores the user details and documents, marks the account as "verifying", and dispatches a background job that compares the data with a vision model.

409.description: Verification already in progress or completed

get.description: Public reference list of all active provinces, ordered by name. Use the returned id when submitting an address.

get.summary: List the cities of a province
get.description: Public reference list of the active cities within a province, ordered by name.
Show the authenticated user's newsletter subscription status.

post.description: Subscribe the authenticated user to the SMS newsletter.
Unsubscribe the authenticated user from the SMS newsletter.

get.description: List the trips the authenticated user drives.

post.description: Create a new trip for the authenticated user.

get.summary: List the authenticated user's upcoming trips
get.description: List the authenticated user's upcoming trips, as driver or passenger.

get.summary: List the authenticated user's past trips
get.description: List the authenticated user's past trips, as driver or passenger.
Show a trip the user drives or has joined.

put.description: Update a trip the user drives, then notify its passengers.

delete.description: Delete a trip the user drives.

post.summary: Join a trip as a passenger
post.description: Join a trip as a passenger.

403.description: Cannot join (own trip or already departed)

delete.description: Leave a trip you previously joined.

403.description: You are not a passenger on this trip

post.description: Attach a new vehicle to the authenticated user.

get.description: Show one of the authenticated user's vehicles.

put.description: Update one of the authenticated user's vehicles.

delete.description: Detach (delete) one of the authenticated user's vehicles.

city_id.description: City id from GET /api/v1/locations/provinces/{province}/cities; must belong to province_id.

address.description: Free-text address details (street, alley, no., postal code).

national_card_image.description: Photo of the national ID card.

vehicle_id.description: A vehicle belonging to the authenticated user.

departure_at.description: When the trip departs; must be in the future.

trunk_empty.description: Whether the vehicle trunk is empty for luggage.

UpdateTripInput.description: All fields are optional; only the provided fields are updated.

vehicle_id.description: A vehicle belonging to the authenticated user.

departure_at.description: When the trip departs; must be in the future.

trunk_empty.description: Whether the vehicle trunk is empty for luggage.

name.description: A preferred name chosen by the user.

UpdateVehicleInput.description: All fields are optional; only the provided fields are updated.

name.description: A preferred name chosen by the user.

identity_rejection_reason.example: The selfie does not match the card photo.

name.description: A preferred name chosen by the user.

phone_number: The phone number field is required.

is_new_user.description: True when this OTP verification registered a brand-new user, signalling the client to show the identity completion flow.

sanctum.description: Pass the token returned by /api/v1/auth/otp/verify as: Authorization: Bearer {token}
